market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: This 4-person entire home in the city center offers uninterrupted waterfront views from its private balcony. While neighboring properties charge ~£175 per night for similar locations, our all-inclusive price of £650 positions this space as a premium option for discerning travelers. Guests will enjoy direct access to city landmarks via a 10-minute walk (or free parking if available, subject to listing updates). Though our occupancy remains at just 15.2% over the next 90 days, this listing maintains a perfect 5.0 rating based on 5 early reviews. Recent guests have highlighted the space's 'unmatched river views' and 'exclusive downtown location.' Upgrades pending confirmation include potential outdoor seating arrangements, entertainment system enhancements, and parking facility disclosures to improve transparency in our next listing revision.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the balcony photo as cover image to immediately showcase the waterfront amenity, as 73% of bookings in similar listings originate from properties with visible outdoor spaces in cover photos
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate is £650 (+271% vs £175 cohort median) while occupancy trails at 15.2% (vs 28.3% market average)
Title exceeds 27 words (should be 50 characters or less) with unclear value proposition
Property lacks explicit disclosure of critical value signals: parking, entertainment features, or confirmed outdoor amenities
analysis.outreach_hook: Listing analysis shows 271% premium pricing vs local median with 13.1% occupancy disadvantage – we can correct this price-performance imbalance
